Container.Name: donetick-caldav
Container.Overview:
CalDAV bridge that exposes Donetick tasks to Apple Calendar, Apple Reminders, Thunderbird, GNOME Calendar, and other CalDAV clients.
Features: - Syncs Donetick chores as VTODO items via CalDAV - Create, update, complete, and delete tasks from your calendar app - Optional: split labels into separate calendar lists (GroupByLabel) - Optional: show tasks as all-day items (AllDayEvents) - Optional: preserve original scheduled time on recurring tasks
Note: Apple Calendar/Reminders require HTTPS for Basic Auth. Use a reverse proxy (Nginx Proxy Manager, Caddy) or Tailscale to provide TLS termination.
Container.Description: CalDAV bridge for Donetick — sync your tasks to Apple Calendar, Reminders, Thunderbird, and other CalDAV clients.

Config.Name: CalDAV Port
Config.Description: Port the CalDAV server listens on.

Config.Name: Donetick URL
Config.Description: URL of your Donetick instance. Use the container name if on the same Docker network.

Config.Name: Donetick API Key
Config.Description: External API secret key from Donetick Settings > API. Required.

Config.Name: Poll Interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often to poll Donetick for task changes. Minimum: 5 seconds.

Config.Name: CalDAV Username
Config.Description: Username for CalDAV Basic Auth login. Enter this when adding the account in your calendar app.

Config.Name: CalDAV Password
Config.Description: Password for CalDAV Basic Auth login. Choose a strong password.

Config.Name: Calendar Name
Config.Description: Display name shown in your calendar app for this task list.

Config.Name: Calendar Color
Config.Description: Calendar color in RGBA hex format (e.g. #4A90D9FF for blue).

Config.Name: Group by Label
Config.Description: When true, creates a separate calendar list per Donetick label. Tasks with zero or multiple labels go to the default list. Useful because Apple Reminders cannot display tags on CalDAV accounts.

Config.Name: Default Calendar Name
Config.Description: Display name for the default/catch-all list when Group by Label is enabled. Tasks with zero or multiple labels appear here.

Config.Name: All-Day Events
Config.Description: When true, tasks appear as all-day items (no specific time) in Calendar.app. Reminders shows 'today' instead of 'today at 14:00'.

Config.Name: Preserve Scheduled Time
Config.Description: When true, keeps the originally configured time on recurring tasks after completion. Fixes Donetick's behaviour of shifting the time to when you completed the task.

Config.Name: TLS Certificate Path
Config.Description: Path to a PEM certificate file inside the container (e.g. /certs/cert.pem). Enables HTTPS. Required for Apple Calendar/Reminders.

Config.Name: TLS Key Path
Config.Description: Path to a PEM private key file inside the container (e.g. /certs/key.pem). Used together with TLS Certificate Path.

Config.Name: TLS PFX Path
Config.Description: Path to a PFX/PKCS12 certificate file (alternative to PEM cert+key). Leave empty if using PEM files.

Config.Name: TLS PFX Password
Config.Description: Password for the PFX file, if encrypted. Leave empty if not using PFX or if unencrypted.

Config.Name: Certificates
Config.Description: Mount your TLS certificate files here (read-only). Only needed if using built-in HTTPS.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: Information (default) for normal use, Debug for troubleshooting CalDAV protocol issues.
